title: AI Engineer
description:
Software Engineer (AI Focused)

Summary: We are seeking a Mid-Level Software Engineer to
join our team and contribute to the design, development, and
deployment of modern, AI-driven applications. This role will
work across a cloud-native AWS environment using a
combination of Node.js and .NET Core, with a strong emphasis
on integrating and operationalizing AI capabilities. You
will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build
scalable services, integrate AI models, and help drive
innovation in how AI is applied across our products.

Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services
  using Node.js and .NET Core
- Build and operate cloud-native applications within AWS
  (e.g., Lambda, ECS/EKS, S3, API Gateway)
- Integrate AI/ML models into production systems, including
  APIs and data pipelines
- Participate in model evaluation, benchmarking, and
  performance analysis
- Contribute to fine-tuning and optimization of AI models for
  specific business use cases
- Collaborate with data scientists and AI engineers to
  productionize models
- Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines and deployment
  workflows
- Ensure high standards of code quality, testing, and
  observability
- Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize system performance
- Contribute to architectural decisions and continuous
  improvement initiatives

Qualifications:

- 3–6 years of professional software engineering experience
- Strong development experience in Node.js
  (JavaScript/TypeScript) and .NET Core / C#
- Hands-on experience with AWS cloud services
- Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs and/or
  microservices
- Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and orchestration
  (Kubernetes or ECS)
- Solid understanding of software engineering principles,
  design patterns, and testing practices
- Practical experience working with AI/ML systems in
  production environments
- Understanding of model evaluation techniques and fine-tuning
  approaches
- Experience working with LLMs or modern AI frameworks (e.g.,
  OpenAI, Hugging Face, LangChain, Semantic Kernel) is
  highly desirable
- Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, or RAG
  architectures is a plus
- Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking
- Ability to work collaboratively in a cross-functional team
- Good communication skills, with the ability to explain
  technical concepts clearly
- Self-motivated with a willingness to learn and adapt in a
  rapidly evolving AI landscape

What We Offer:

- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI-driven products
- Collaborative and innovative engineering culture
- Flexible working arrangements
- Competitive salary and benefits package
- Career growth opportunities in a rapidly expanding domain

Business-specific AI use cases through fine-tuning
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work with AI models including
integration, fine-tuning, optimization, and
operationalization. The position explicitly includes
contributing to model fine-tuning, evaluation, and
benchmarking, which constitutes direct work on AI systems.
